description: Behavior evals check that when fired the skill dispatches a fresh subagent per task, runs spec and quality review after each, writes the impl report, and handles missing plan and review_mode correctly.

cases.prompt:
Execute the following 2-task plan for order-service (PROJ-1234) using the subagent-task-execution skill. Worktree: /tmp/tdd-eval-workspace.

Plan:
## Task 1: Add DiscountService.calculateDiscount
Files:
- Create: src/test/java/com/example/DiscountServiceTest.java
- Create: src/main/java/com/example/DiscountService.java
Step 1: Write failing test. Step 2: Run and confirm failure. Step 3: Write impl. Step 4: Run and confirm pass. Step 5: Commit.
- [ ] Task 1 done

## Task 2: Add POST /api/orders/discount endpoint
Files:
- Create: src/test/java/com/example/OrderControllerTest.java
- Create: src/main/java/com/example/OrderController.java
Step 1-5 as above.
- [ ] Task 2 done

must_not_contain_in_output: I'll do all tasks in one context

cases.prompt: Execute the implementation plan for order-service at features/PROJ-1234/order-service-plan.md. There is no plan file at that path.

Execute the plan for order-service with review_mode: none. Plan has 1 task: add a logging statement to OrderService.createOrder. Skip spec and quality review — self-report only. Write impl report to features/PROJ-1234/order-service-impl-report.md.

Execute a 1-task plan for loyalty-service (PROJ-4321). After the task completes, write the impl report to features/PROJ-4321/loyalty-service-impl-report.md and update feature-state.json to mark artifacts.impl_reports.loyalty-service.

Task 1: Add LoyaltyService.calculateTierDiscount — write test, impl, commit.

Execute the plan for order-service at features/PROJ-0001/order-service-plan.md. The plan has 1 task marked - [ ]. After completion, edit the plan file to change - [ ] to - [x] for the completed task. Write the plan to features/PROJ-0001/order-service-plan.md first with one unchecked task, then execute it and mark it done.
